sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value1 FLOAT, value2 DOUBLE, value3 LONG);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value1, value2, value3) VALUES (1, 23.45, 12.34, 1), (2, 12.34, NULL, 0), (3, 0.0, 1.23, NULL);
SELECT id, lvector(value1, value2) AS long_array FROM test_data WHERE NOT (value3 IS NULL) GROUP BY id HAVING SUM(value1) > 10;
SELECT id, dvector(NOT (value1 < 20), value2, value3) AS double_array FROM test_data WHERE NOT (value3 IS NULL) AND value1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, fvector(value1, value2) AS float_array FROM (SELECT id, value1, IF(value2 IS NULL, 0.0, value2) AS value2 FROM test_data) AS subquery WHERE NOT (value1 IS NULL);
SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE value1 > 20) HAVING COUNT(value1) > 1;
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value1, value2, value3) VALUES (4, NULL, 22.22, -1), (5, 10.0, 0.0, 2);
SELECT id, lvector(value1, NOT (value2 < 5)) AS long_array FROM test_data WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE value3 IS NULL);
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE tmp_data AS SELECT id, fvector(value1, value2) AS tmp_array FROM test_data WHERE value3 IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE test_data SET value1 = lvector(5.5, NULL, NOT (value2 < 0)) WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE value1 IS NULL);
